title: arif_forge (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_forge`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_forge` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Hard rule: If symbolic authority uncertain, FORGE must dry_run only.

forge_precheck.description: §3.F — Required pre-mutation gate (full schema in forge_precheck.schema.json).

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_forge output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
